full_text:
Zhihan Aleksandra: At least include here where the potential data is (if any) and indicate that project was discontinued

Goals: EMT profiling through tcycif and geomx

Estimated timeline:

December: tCycIF

January: GeoMx

#2401

Validation of Mariana's and other antibodies

#2402

First pilot experiment

#2403

Order and validation of the new antibodies

#2404

Selection of the samples for the second round of experiments

#2405

ROI selection

#2406

GeoMx training

Set priorities, which tasks are interdependent?

I will keep progressing on the computational part while the rest of the projects are ongoing

Geomx data?

Cycif Data: Adas antibody validations in cold storage 1.
